Reproduction: Album Order Reverts After Closing Asset Viewer (#28383)

Simulates what happens when SvelteKit re-fetches page data after navigating away from and back to the album (e.g. closing the asset viewer).

BEFORE — $derived(data.album)

Any update to data.album overwrites the local album variable, discarding user changes like sort order.

Server data order: desc
Local album order: desc
AFTER — $state with ID-guarded effect

Local album is preserved. Only when the album ID changes does it re-sync from server data.

Server data order: desc
Local album order: desc
